mnemonics.title: RGB to HSI Conversion
mnemonics.content: For Hue calculation: Remember 'RGB Triangle' - The angle θ is calculated using the cosine formula based on the differences between R, G, and B components.

mnemonics.title: Color Models
mnemonics.content: Additive RGB: Red, Green, Blue for Displays. Subtractive CMY: Cyan, Magenta, Yellow for Printing. Perceptual HSI: Hue, Saturation, Intensity for Processing.
